title: World Gold Council COVID-19 statement
gist: A World Gold Council statement on the gold mining industry's COVID-19 response, noting that some member miners paused operations while others continued, and listing member companies undertaking humanitarian initiatives. It contains no market data, prices, or investable signal.

insights.claim: During COVID-19 some WGC member gold miners paused operations under local government guidance while others continued, citing their essential role in local economies.
insights.speaker: World Gold Council
insights.so_what: Operational context only; the mixed pause/continue pattern is historical color, not a current trading signal.
insights.quote: some have decided to pause operations, given local government guidance or their assessment of the risks. Others have assessed the circumstances and determined that they can and should continue operating
insights.locator: Our Members operate in a variety of different jurisdictions

insights.claim: This is a corporate COVID-19 response statement listing WGC member miners (including Barrick, Newmont, Kinross, Franco Nevada and others) and contains no gold prices, demand data, or investable market signal.
insights.speaker: World Gold Council
insights.so_what: Flagged honestly: no actionable market content; included only for completeness.
